zh.Walgrave, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦爾格拉福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Waldegrave於1335年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Waldegrave I32歲，母親Agnes d'Aubeney29歲。他於大約1356年與Jayne Silvester在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1410年5月2日在英國素福爾可享年75歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Waldegrave于1335年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Waldegrave I32岁，母亲Agnes d'Aubeney29岁。他于大约1356年与Jayne Silvester在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1410年5月2日在英国素福爾可享年75岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可布勒斯 聖 瑪麗。

nameMeanings.name: Waldegrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Walgrave (Northants), which is recorded as Waldgrave in 1086.

variants.name: Woolgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a late variant of   Waldegrave  .

variants.name: Allgrove
meanings: English: unexplained, possibly a variant of   Waldegrave  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Waldegrave was born in 1335, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Waldegrave I, was 32 and his mother, Agnes d'Aubeney, was 29. He married Jayne Silvester about 1356, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 2 May 1410, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

fr.Bures Saint Mary, Babergh, Suffolk, Engl: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Waldegrave est né en 1335, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Waldegrave I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Agnes d'Aubeney, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Jayne Silvester environ 1356, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 2 mai 1410, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Waldegrave 1335 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Waldegrave I 32 und seine Mutter Agnes d'Aubeney 29. Er hat um 1356 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Jayne Silvester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 2. Mai 1410 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Suffolk, England und wurde in Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Waldegrave è nato il nel 1335 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Waldegrave I, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Agnes d'Aubeney, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Jayne Silvester circa 1356, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 maggio 1410, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Waldegraveが1335年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Waldegrave Iは32歳，母Agnes d'Aubeneyは29歳であった。約1356年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでJayne Silvesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1410年5月2日にイギリススフォルクで75歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクブレス サイント マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Bures Saint Mary, Babergh, Suffolk, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Waldegrave(이)가 1335년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Waldegrave I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes d'Aubeney(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1356년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Jayne Silvester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1410년 5월 2일 영국 수폴크에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 버스 세인트 메리에 묻혔다.

pt.Bures Saint Mary, Babergh, Suffolk, Engl: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Waldegrave nasceu em 1335, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Waldegrave I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Agnes d'Aubeney, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Jayne Silvester aproximadamente 1356, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 2 de maio de 1410, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Bures Saint Mary, Babergh, Suffolk, Engl: Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Bures Saint Mary, Babergh, Suffolk, Engl: буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Waldegrave родился в 1335 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Waldegrave I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes d'Aubeney, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Jayne Silvester около 1356 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 2 мая 1410 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности буресь сеинт мэри, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Waldegrave nació en 1335, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Waldegrave I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Agnes d'Aubeney, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Jayne Silvester aproximadamente 1356, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de mayo de 1410, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Bures Saint Mary, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
